description: A paralegal needs to apply unique Bates stamp numbers to a set of documents before producing them in discovery.

nodes.task_description: Select the set of documents to be produced.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the final production set.

nodes.task_description: Configure the Bates stamp format (e.g., prefix 'ABC', starting number '000001').

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly sets up the numbering scheme.

nodes.task_description: Apply the Bates stamp to the bottom right corner of every page of every document in the production set.

expected_outcome.value: All pages are uniquely and sequentially numbered.
